records.ety: [L. candor, fr. candëre; cf. F. candeur. See candid.]

defs: Whiteness; brightness; (as applied to moral conditions) unsullied purity; innocence.
quotes: Nor yor unquestioned integrity Shall e'er be sullied with one taint or spot That may take from your innocence and candor.

defs: A disposition to treat subjects with fairness; freedom from prejudice or disguise; frankness; sincerity.
quotes: Attribute superior sagacity and candor to those who held that side of the question.
